CheckTitle: Ensure no agent identity is disabled by Microsoft
Description: Checks whether any agent identity has disabledByMicrosoftStatus set to a non-null value such as DisabledDueToViolationOfServicesAgreement. This indicates Microsoft has flagged the agent for suspicious, abusive, or malicious activity.
Risk: An agent disabled by Microsoft may have been involved in suspicious or abusive activity. The underlying blueprint or application may be compromised. Other agents from the same blueprint should be reviewed.

Remediation.Recommendation: Investigate the disabled agent's activity logs. Review all other agent identities created from the same blueprint. Contact Microsoft support if the disablement is unexpected.

SourceNotes: disabledByMicrosoftStatus is inherited from servicePrincipal. Possible values: null, NotDisabled, DisabledDueToViolationOfServicesAgreement.
